item.title: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE: A troubling case
item.description: A look at an ongoing investigation involving a suspect who delivered Christmas presents before a serious incident. Details are still being reviewed by authorities.

item.description: A factual look at a criminal case where personal relationships and financial motives became central to a tragic chain of events.

item.title: Woman's Body Found in Ex-Husband's House
item.description: A factual overview of a criminal investigation following the discovery of a woman’s body at a residence connected to her former husband.
